critique: Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_column is intended to remove irrelevant columns and retain only those pertinent to the question (e.g., rider and points). Using f_select_column(*) keeps all columns and fails to narrow the table to the relevant information, misapplying the function’s purpose.
